title: A Machine Learning approach for Total Water storage anomaly eXtension back to 1980 (ML-TWiX)
summary: A data-focused publication on extending total water storage anomaly records using machine learning and model-based predictors.

title: Black Sea level variability and its driving factors in the last two decades
summary: Analysis of Black Sea level variability and its physical drivers over the last two decades.

title: A copula-supported Bayesian framework for spatial downscaling of GRACE-derived terrestrial water storage flux
summary: A methodological contribution combining Bayesian ideas and spatial downscaling for GRACE-derived hydrological signals.
